contact.address: 110 Ayres Rd, Old Trafford, Stretford, Manchester M16 7QT

sample_reviews.author: James Thornton
sample_reviews.text: Called L & Q out for a burst pipe and they arrived within the hour. Sorted the issue quickly and professionally, very fairly priced too. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah Mellor
sample_reviews.text: Had a new boiler installed by L & Q and the whole process was seamless. Friendly team, tidy work and great value. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: David Okafor
sample_reviews.text: Very reliable and honest plumbers. Fixed a leak in our bathroom that two other plumbers had failed to find. Knowledgeable and professional throughout.

brand.usp: L & Q Plumbing Solutions delivers fast, reliable plumbing and heating services across Manchester, with honest pricing and no hidden extras. Based in Old Trafford, we're your local experts for everything from emergency repairs to full boiler installations.
brand.about_paragraph: We're L & Q Plumbing Solutions, a Manchester-based plumbing and heating contractor serving homeowners and businesses across Old Trafford, Stretford and the wider Manchester area. We pride ourselves on turning up on time, doing the job right first time, and leaving your home as tidy as we found it. Whether it's an emergency callout or a planned installation, you can count on us to get it sorted.
